scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm fmt:check && pnpm typecheck
scripts.release:latest: bumpp --tag latest && pnpm --filter './packages/*' publish --access public --tag latest --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:latest: pnpm -r --filter @farming-labs/* build && pnpm -r --filter @farming-labs/* publish --access public --tag latest --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:latest:dry-run: pnpm -r --filter @farming-labs/* build && pnpm -r --filter @farming-labs/* publish --access public --tag latest --no-git-checks --dry-run
scripts.publish:beta: pnpm -r --filter @farming-labs/* build && pnpm -r --filter @farming-labs/* publish --access public --tag beta --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:beta:dry-run: pnpm -r --filter @farming-labs/* build && pnpm -r --filter @farming-labs/* publish --access public --tag beta --no-git-checks --dry-run
